name: XL Woven Abaca Basket - Brightroom™: Handwoven Storage, Lacquered Finish, Rectangle Floor Crate, 22"x15"x13"
description:
Bring artisanal flair to your home organization with the XL Woven Abaca Basket from Brightroom™. Made from the abaca plant for natural texture and beauty, this handwoven basket has a rectangular shape that makes it ideal for storing throw blankets, pillows, toys and more. This decorative storage basket has a lacquered design in a brown hue that adds a new level of stylish storage to your home. Plus, integrated handles make it convenient for taking from room to room.

Size: 22inL x 15inW x 13inH
Interior Dimensions: 20.75in L x 13.75in W x 12.5in H

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
